# Phase 22: Extension Icon — Verification Report

**Phase Goal:** Replace four 1x1 pixel placeholder PNGs in public/icons/ with real icon assets generated by a Node.js script using only built-in modules.
**Verified:** 2026-06-22T10:15:00Z
**Status:** passed
**Re-verification:** No — initial verification

---

## Goal Achievement

### Observable Truths

| # | Truth | Status | Evidence |
|---|-------|--------|----------|
| 1 | Running `node scripts/generate-icons.js` exits 0 and prints four confirmation lines | VERIFIED | Script executed; exit code 0; stdout shows four "Written: ..." lines with correct byte counts |
| 2 | Each output PNG is correctly sized: icon-16.png is 16x16, icon-32.png is 32x32, icon-48.png is 48x48, icon-128.png is 128x128 | VERIFIED | Binary header check: all four files pass `sig=89504e470d0a1a0a w=N h=N OK` |
| 3 | Each PNG has a blue (#3b82f6) background with a white checkmark motif | VERIFIED | IDAT decompression of icon-16.png: pixel (0,0) = 3b 82 f6 ff (blue-500), pixel (9,3) = ff ff ff ff (white checkmark start) |
| 4 | package.json has an `icons` script entry that invokes the generator | VERIFIED | `package.json` line 16: `"icons": "node scripts/generate-icons.js"` |
| 5 | manifest.json is not modified — paths were already correct | VERIFIED | manifest.json icons field references all four paths (public/icons/icon-{16,32,48,128}.png); commit a857044 stat shows manifest.json was not touched |

**Score:** 5/5 truths verified

---

### Required Artifacts

| Artifact | Expected | Status | Details |
|----------|----------|--------|---------|
| `scripts/generate-icons.js` | ES module PNG generator using Node.js built-ins only (zlib, fs, path, url) | VERIFIED | 5409 bytes; imports only zlib, fs, path, url; no npm packages; implements CRC32 table, encodeChunk(), makePNG(), makeIconPixels() |
| `public/icons/icon-16.png` | 16x16 RGBA PNG — Chrome toolbar icon | VERIFIED | 112 bytes; PNG sig OK; w=16 h=16; was 66-byte placeholder per commit diff |
| `public/icons/icon-32.png` | 32x32 RGBA PNG — Chrome toolbar HiDPI icon | VERIFIED | 137 bytes; PNG sig OK; w=32 h=32; was 66-byte placeholder per commit diff |
| `public/icons/icon-48.png` | 48x48 RGBA PNG — Extensions manager list icon | VERIFIED | 172 bytes; PNG sig OK; w=48 h=48; was 66-byte placeholder per commit diff |
| `public/icons/icon-128.png` | 128x128 RGBA PNG — Chrome Web Store / chrome://extensions detail icon | VERIFIED | 372 bytes; PNG sig OK; w=128 h=128; was 66-byte placeholder per commit diff |

**Note on file sizes:** SUMMARY.md documents a plan deviation — the plan expected sizes >200B, >400B, >700B, >3000B. Actual sizes are smaller (112B, 137B, 172B, 372B) because solid blue-500 background compresses highly efficiently under zlib deflate. This is not a defect: all files are substantially larger than the original 66-byte 1x1 placeholders, the PNG headers are valid, and the pixel content is correct. The compressibility of uniform-color pixel data is the explanation.

| `scripts/generate-icons.js` | `public/icons/icon-{16,32,48,128}.png` | `writeFileSync` after `deflateSync` encodes scanlines | VERIFIED | Lines 149-154: `writeFileSync(outPath, png)` inside `for (const size of [16, 32, 48, 128])` loop |
| `package.json scripts.icons` | `scripts/generate-icons.js` | `node scripts/generate-icons.js` | VERIFIED | `"icons": "node scripts/generate-icons.js"` at package.json line 16 |
